PROP-01b-partial2-inv-009.text: Leftover assetOut after bid must be forwarded to receiver if receiver != address(0).
PROP-01b-partial2-inv-009.assertion: post bid(): s_receiver != address(0) AND assetOutBalance > 0 => safeTransfer(s_receiver, assetOutBalance)

locations.note: receiver check and safeTransfer at lines 85-91
